mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction_record(user_id, category_id, type, amount, remark, record_date) VALUES(#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{remark}, #{recordDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE transaction_record SET category_id =#{record.categoryId}, type = #{record.type}, amount = #{record.amount}, remark = #{record.remark}, record_date = #{record.recordDate} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM transaction_record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT transaction_record.id, transaction_record.user_id AS userId, transaction_record.category_id AS categoryId, transaction_record.type, transaction_record.amount, transaction_record.remark, transaction_record.record_date AS recordDate FROM transaction_record INNER JOIN transaction_category ON transaction_record.category_id = transaction_category.id WHERE transaction_record.user_id = #{userId} AND transaction_category.user_id = #{userId} AND transaction_category.id = #{categoryId}
